'''Lelin-Dor''' was the [[First Patriarch]] of [[Serroco]] until the [[Jedi Civil War]]. During the war, [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] had him killed, seeing him as a political leader whose removal could lead to governmental destabilization.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}}
